releaseNotes: Fixed: player controls no longer flash off instantly when pressing OK on the remote. Movies/Shows playback now keeps the screen from sleeping and won't trigger the Fire TV screensaver. Added rewind/fast-forward/stop/closed-captions to the Movies/Shows player, a sleep timer, an optional Auto Frame Rate setting for smoother movie playback, an Exit App button, an external EPG URL option, and channel logo/EPG-source priority settings. The TV Guide side panel now shows labels next to its icons.
